structure_hint: Im-3m (bcc, ibrav=3, celldm=4.89945 Bohr, 4 atoms O+3H)
question: Do h3o harmonic imaginary modes (16/16 q, deepest -1133 cm^-1 BZ / -882 cm^-1 zone-boundary / -682 cm^-1 Gamma) renormalize to real under SSCHA quantum-anharmonic treatment?

compute.dft: Quantum ESPRESSO 7.5 pw.x (PBE ultrasoft, ecutwfc=65 Ry, ecutrho=540 Ry, MP smearing 0.02, 3x3x3 k on supercell)
compute.host: pool ubu-1 (Ryzen 5 9600X, 6c/12t) — FREE per @D d7 (small cell)

sscha_config.method: Gamma-dyn cold-start -> interpolate to 2x2x2 supercell (96 modes); SSCHA auto-relax derives full supercell force constants from ensemble DFT forces
sscha_config.harmonic_seed_source: QE scf+ph.x 2x2x2 (Gamma dyn; q2/q3 abandoned under host contention — SSCHA refines supercell FC from ensemble forces regardless, standard cold-start)
sscha_config.note_zone_boundary: interpolated supercell harmonic baseline seeds zone-boundary FC from Gamma; the ANHARMONIC supercell FC (and stability verdict) come from the 2x2x2 ensemble DFT forces, which DO sample zone-boundary displacements

harmonic.ph_out_imaginary_modes: 16/16 q unstable; Gamma -682 cm^-1 (T1u), zone-boundary -882 cm^-1, deepest BZ -1133 cm^-1 (per RTSC.md)
harmonic.harmonic_validity: INVALID for Tc — computed on a dynamically unstable (imaginary-mode) structure; Tc=180K is unphysical pre-anharmonic-renormalization

free_energy_hessian.method: Ensemble.get_free_energy_hessian (include_v4=False; 4th-order bubble correction beyond auxiliary Phi)

anharmonic_sscha.structure_relaxation: centroids stay at Im-3m high-symmetry sites (struct gradient ~0, 48 crystal symmetries preserved across all 6 populations) — NO symmetry-breaking distortion; stabilization is purely vibrational (frequency-channel)
anharmonic_sscha.convergence: free energy stable to ~1 meV across populations; FC gradient decreased monotonically to its statistical-noise floor (error bar +/-23565); ran to max_pop=6

verdict.imaginary_to_real: ALL — 27/27 imaginary supercell modes (harmonic) -> 0 imaginary (anharmonic). Deepest harmonic -677 cm^-1 (Gamma) renormalized to +260 cm^-1 (lowest optical).
verdict.dynamical_stability: STABILIZED — both SSCHA auxiliary frequencies AND the free-energy Hessian are positive-definite (0 imaginary modes). h3o Im-3m is dynamically stable when quantum-anharmonic effects are included.
verdict.d2_breakthrough: h3o is NOT an Im-3m dead-end — anharmonicity rescues the harmonic instability. This flips the h3o.json `stable=false` (harmonic) to dynamically-stable (anharmonic).

anharmonic_Tc.status: DEFERRED (honest) — dynamical stability is established, but a rigorous anharmonic Tc requires recomputing the electron-phonon coupling lambda with the SSCHA-renormalized dynamical matrix (a follow-up ph.x electron_phonon run on h3o_sscha_final.dyn). The harmonic lambda=2.479/Tc=180K are INVALID (imaginary-mode structure).
anharmonic_Tc.qualitative_expectation: The deepest soft mode hardened from imaginary to +260 cm^-1 (large stiffening) and omega_log(phonon-spectrum) ~ 969 cm^-1; stiffer phonons typically REDUCE lambda vs a soft-mode-enhanced harmonic estimate, so the true anharmonic Tc is expected BELOW the (invalid) harmonic 180K. Direct number pending the el-ph follow-up.
anharmonic_Tc.next_step: ph.x electron_phonon='simple' on h3o_sscha_final.dyn -> anharmonic lambda, omega_log -> hexa verify allen_dynes_tc <lam> <wlog> 0.10 <Tc>

verify.note: hexa verify allen_dynes_tc deferred — requires the anharmonic lambda/omega_log from the el-ph follow-up (not produced by this stability-focused SSCHA run). The harmonic verify (lambda=2.479, wlog=1096.6 -> Tc 179.78K) is recorded in h3o.json but is INVALID (unstable structure).

cost.sscha_run_note: ran on free pool ubu-1 (no vast rent) per @D d7
cost.vast_pod_37670312_note: previous agent's pod, unreachable (ssh transport exit 255, tool-wide vast outage); billed ~9.2h since 2026-05-24T23:17 before THIS agent destroyed it (cloud down, verified gone). Est at ~$0.30/hr GPU.

provenance.driver: run_sscha_h3o.py (cellconstructor.calculators.Espresso — ASE 3.28 Espresso incompatible with cc 1.6 get_results dispatch)

absorbed_note: Dynamical-stability gate PASS (anharmonic, both aux + Hessian). absorbed deferred until anharmonic Tc gate (el-ph follow-up) per @D d5 — stability alone is not the full M8 gate (needs Tc>200K + pressure).
